baseline.reason: Correctly identifies the memory leak (CWE-401) at bad.c:342-349: avio_open_dyn_buf allocates a DynBuffer+AVIOContext, but the cleanup via put_packet/avio_close_dyn_buf is guarded by nut->sp_count, so when sp_count==0 the memory is never freed. Trigger path (line references, conditional bypass) is accurate and concise, with no unsupported speculation.

vastdb.reason: Identical root-cause analysis: avio_open_dyn_buf leaks when nut->sp_count==0 because the conditional at line 343 prevents put_packet (which calls avio_close_dyn_buf) from executing. Trigger path correctly traces from allocation to early return without cleanup. Accurate CWE-401 classification, no unsupported claims.
